title: Sign of the Product of an Array

testcases.input: nums = [-1,-2,-3,-4,3,2,1] Output: 1 Explanation: The product of all values in the array is 144, and signFunc(144) = 1
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The product of all values in the array is 144, and signFunc(144) = 1

testcases.input: nums = [1,5,0,2,-3] Output: 0 Explanation: The product of all values in the array is 0, and signFunc(0) = 0
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The product of all values in the array is 0, and signFunc(0) = 0

testcases.input: nums = [-1,1,-1,1,-1] Output: -1 Explanation: The product of all values in the array is -1, and signFunc(-1) = -1
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: The product of all values in the array is -1, and signFunc(-1) = -1
